lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to verify the mining loadout, slot sizes and power budget for this hull.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-6 Transporter ship page — manufacturer specs and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hardpoint count, optional-internal slot sizes and base hull stats behind the mining build on this page.

sources.label: Inara — Type-6 Transporter
sources.what: Ship specification, base stats and shipyard pricing cross-checked for the cost figures here.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Type-6 Transporter
sources.what: Hull role, Lakon background and hardpoint / internal layout used to frame its mining limits.
